title: Maybe Baby it On Me
description: Exploring romantic relationships and personal accountability.
lyrics: ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪  ♪ ♪ ♪ ♪ You know when we walked in the door I lost my mind Girl you were so beautiful the sun didn't compare How them hips swayed in the air Girl I look at you and see a future that I've never seen before Kids running on the floor while we rocked our chairs Wondering who the hell they are That's right girl Maybe it's all me Old fights, old nights All the reasons why you couldn't sleep tonight There's some in the bathroom downstairs Trying to write the right words Or maybe baby it's all new Maybe it's all on me I give you the stability Protecting your need No baby maybe it's all on me Now remember when I left that time I went to Alabama State Did some shows there Told you that the girls weren't great Nothing to look at Nothing like you couldn't compare Man girl your hair Your personality was everything to me Told them little girls to move I'll go play at the fair Find you a boy that you can treat unfair As me I'm waiting for me to get home My girl's there all alone Maybe baby you won't throw me away If I say all the right words tonight Maybe maybe That you'll let me stay Maybe it's all me All the fights, all the dark in my life It's all me Best you go run free It's all me It's all on the door Comments on a scribe on the way All the music in the gym And I inside the mood We hide in our own vacant eyes Maybe it's all me At least I can look at me that way And have accountability Maybe it's all me It's all me Maybe maybe it's all me

Maybe it's all me

I give you the stability

Did some shows there

Nothing to look at
Nothing like you couldn't compare
Man girl your hair
Your personality was everything to me
Told them little girls to move
I'll go play at the fair
Find you a boy that you can treat unfair
As me I'm waiting for me to get home

Maybe baby you won't throw me away
If I say all the right words tonight
Maybe maybe
That you'll let me stay
Maybe it's all me
All the fights, all the dark in my life
It's all me
Best you go run free
It's all me
It's all on the door

All the music in the gym
And I inside the mood
We hide in our own vacant eyes
Maybe it's all me
At least I can look at me that way
And have accountability
Maybe it's all me
It's all me
Maybe maybe it's all me
